title: Who Gets Left Behind by Mainstream Veteran Culture
gist: A Marine Pulse podcast episode on the shame some veterans feel for never seeing combat and how the rise of 'vet bro' podcasts spreads false civilian assumptions about post-service life.

insights.claim: Some veterans carry shame for never having seen combat, a dynamic that mainstream veteran culture often overlooks.
insights.speaker: War on the Rocks
insights.so_what: Points to a gap between the majority veteran experience and its popular portrayal.

insights.claim: As 'vet bro' podcasts grow in popularity, they spread false civilian assumptions about what post-service life looks like for the majority of veterans.
insights.speaker: War on the Rocks
insights.so_what: Media-driven narratives are shaping civilian perceptions of veterans away from the typical reality.
insights.locator: As "vet bro" podcasts grow in popularity
